description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stylised rectangular case and stainless steel backDial style: Black dial with branding, steel toned hands, steel and silver toned markingsFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap Style: Black leather strap with a tang clasp and two loopsWater resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Fastrack caseWarranty: 2 years from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
